title: rubus × ohtakiensis
intro: Rubus × ohtakiensis, also known as the Ohtaki blackberry, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Rubus genus, which is commonly referred to as the blackberry or raspberry family. The medicinal properties of Rubus × ohtakiensis include its high content of anthocyanins and other antioxidants, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with consuming Rubus × ohtakiensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Rubus × ohtakiensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, which can be used to support overall well-being and potentially alleviate various health conditions.
